# Bitbucket Automation — GitHub Copilot

Canonical skills live under **`.cursor/skill-library/`** (same as Cursor).

## Mandatory first step (every invocation)

Read in order:

1. `.cursor/skill-library/git-sync.md`
2. `.cursor/skill-library/bitbucket-unify-enterprise.md`

## After skills load

Follow the same workflow as `.cursor/agents/bitbucket-automation.md` (Cursor).

Registry: `.github/copilot/AGENT-SKILL-BINDINGS.md`.
